top_gap_prompt: Best compliance that works with GitHub and AWS
category_long: automated security compliance platform for SOC 2 ISO 27001 and more

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Vanta's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Vanta's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Vanta lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best compliance that works with GitHub and AWS
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best compliance for engineering and security teams at startups pursuing compliance certifications?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: compliance tools with native GitHub integration
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
